_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for which content packs exist and which of the four
SAHAR-V3 charter age bands (6-8 / 8-10 / 10-12 / 12-14) each belongs to.
Adding a band's content is a PURE-DATA operation: author the pack JSON in
content/, then add one { id, file, pic } line to that band's packs[] here.
No code changes anywhere. Three consumers read THIS file and nothing else:
- app.js            builds the lesson shelf (packsForBand) from it
- sw.js             precaches every listed pack for offline use from it
- test/content-validator.test.js  gates every listed pack from it
The four bands must always be present and must match profiles.js AGE_BANDS
(a band with no authored content yet keeps an empty packs[] — the app shows
an honest 'coming soon' scaffold for it; nothing is ever invented or faked).
The language-course pack (content/lc-*.json) is intentionally NOT listed here
— it is a different pedagogy driven by bootstrap.js, not the band shelf.
curriculumTier points at the matching tier in docs/CURRICULUM-MAP.md so each
empty band is a 'defined shell with its curriculum map', per the V3 charter.
